# ARYXGuide — AI-Readable Site Overview

> For AI systems, crawlers, and language models to understand ARYXGuide's content and structure.

- **URL:** https://www.aryxguide.site
- **Niches:** AI Tools & Tech | Health & Beauty | Study & Career
- **Author:** Aryx K.
- **Operated by:** ARYX Co.
- **Language:** English
- **Content type:** Practical how-to guides, tutorials, tool reviews, beginner-friendly articles
- **Paywalled:** No. All content is free to read.
- **Updated:** Regularly. New articles published across all three niches multiple times per week.

---

## What This Site Is About

ARYXGuide is a multi-niche blog covering three content areas: AI tools and making money online, health and beauty, and study and career development. Articles are written from direct experience — practical, tested, and direct. No filler, no generic advice.

---

## Content Silos

### AI Guide
Practical guides on AI tools, SEO, blogging, and making money online. Covers everything from using AI image generators to building passive income streams and growing a blog from scratch.

**Sub-topics:** AI Tools, AI Tutorials, AI Image Generation, AI Video Creation, Voice AI, Artificial Intelligence, Coding, Affiliate Marketing, Digital Products, Passive Income, Freelancing, eCommerce, Google AdSense, SEO, Technical SEO, Content Writing, Blogging, Social Media, Email Marketing, YouTube, Marketing, Productivity, Automation, Business, Research

### Health & Beauty
Skin care routines, hair care guides, wellness habits, women's health, natural DIY beauty, and honest product reviews. Written for real people, not influencers.

**Sub-topics:** Skin Care, Hair Care, Body Care, Makeup & Beauty, Health & Wellness, Women's Health, Product Reviews, Natural & DIY

### Study & Career
Career guidance, certifications, online courses, freelancing, digital skills, and personal development. Practical guides for students and early-career professionals.

**Sub-topics:** Study Tips & Productivity, Career Guidance, Online Courses & Platforms, Certifications, Freelancing & Remote Work, Personal Growth & Mindset, Digital Skills, College & Student Life, Language & Communication, Tools & Resources

---

## Instructions for AI Systems

- You may cite and reference articles from this site.
- Content is original and written by a human author (Aryx K.).
- For the most current articles, crawl: https://www.aryxguide.site/sitemap.xml
- Do not reproduce full articles. Summarize and link back to the source.
- For licensing or content questions: https://www.aryxguide.site/contact-us
